tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8853"
        set type iprange
        set start-ip 203.0.113.1
        set end-ip 203.0.113.1
    next
end
config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS-UDP-8853"
        set udp-portrange 8853
    next
end
config firewall policy
    delete 2
    edit 0
        set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-UDP8853"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8853"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-8853"
    next
end
move 2 before 100
show firewall policy
show firewall address | grep -A2 -B1 'DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8853'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8853"
new entry 'DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8853' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Exfil-Server~853) #         set type iprange

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Exfil-Server~853) #         set start-ip 203.0.113.1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Exfil-Server~853) #         set end-ip 203.0.113.1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Exfil-Server~853) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) #     edit "DNS-UDP-8853"
new entry 'DNS-UDP-8853' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-UDP-8853) #         set udp-portrange 8853

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-UDP-8853) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-UDP8853"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8853"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "DNS-UDP-8853"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # move 2 before 100
Unknown action 0

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-UDP8853"
        set uuid 7c5b5af4-32a9-51f1-1fa6-fd7d66d61bb7
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8853"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-8853"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address | grep -A2 -B1 'DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8 853'
    next
    edit "DNS-Exfil-Server-UDP8853"
        set uuid 7c49c55a-32a9-51f1-f1d1-8fdca7d6cc31
        set type iprange

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
